feedback.text: Hello, I have a few considerations for the Digital Fairness Act. Firstly is age verification, I think it can not be implemented in a way that it works, and trying to would only lead to more censorship. My another concern would be that game publishers should not have the right to remove access to video games that consumers have paid for. I would like to also say that most of your other regulations such as DSA have done great things to life online.
